name: Buteos Systems
history: Founded in 2023, Buteos Systems is dedicated to revolutionizing digital presence and business efficiency through cutting-edge technology solutions. We believe in making complex technology accessible and impactful, providing businesses with the tools they need to thrive in the digital landscape.

products.name: Mobile Applications
products.description: Put your business in your customers' pockets with powerful, engaging mobile applications

officeHours: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM (Central Time). Weekends by appointment only.
mission: To empower businesses with intelligent automation and technology-driven insights, fostering growth and enhancing customer experiences.
careers: We're always looking for talented individuals passionate about technology! Check our website or email careers@buteossystems.com for current openings.
defaultInfo: Buteos Systems specializes in comprehensive digital solutions to enhance business operations and customer engagement. We offer services ranging from web development and mobile applications to AI solutions and digital marketing. Our office hours are Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 5 PM CT. You can find more about our products and services by asking specific questions or visiting our website.
